phases.title: claim_leases schema + shared types + migration
phases.outcome: claim_leases table + LEASE_MODES/LEASE_*_DEFAULT/claim_reclaimed audit action/claim.lease.reclaimed event + migration 0021; shared 433, server 1255, typecheck 6/6, lint 0. No behavior change.

phases.title: claim-lease.service lifecycle + opportunistic sweep
phases.outcome: claim-lease.service.ts (readLease/deriveLiveness/acquireLease/renewLease/sweepStaleClaims; off/shadow/on; reclaim txn mirrors forceClaim w/ audit+SSE+atomic abort guard). 11/11 new, server 1266. Pure addition, shadow default.

phases.title: renew-on-action + self-stale rule in assertClaimOk; lease creation on claim/start/pick
phases.outcome: assertClaimOk liveness-aware (single seam via 3 wrappers): holder renews/creates lease never 409; non-holder 409 unchanged; human no lease. Lease create on claim/start/pick(+idempotent), teardown on release/terminal/archive, transfer on force-claim, sync on assignee PATCH. Shadow sweep wired (no-op). +deleteLease primitive. 12/12 new, server 1278.

phases.title: reclaim completeness (epics+proposals+not-started) + remove dead code + audit/SSE finalize
phases.outcome: Registered claim.lease.reclaimed in EVENT_NAMES (streams via onAll) + mapped to activity 'assigned'; dropped as-never cast; removed dead cleanExpiredClaims/reclaimStaleTasks (zero callers). Proved not-started-epic + proposal reclaim (audit ledger + activity feed). server 1286, shared 433.

phases.title: seal — config surfacing (default shadow) + e2e + docs + full suite green
phases.outcome: Env-configurable lease mode/TTL/grace (PM_LEASE_MODE/PM_LEASE_TTL_SEC/PM_LEASE_GRACE_SEC, default shadow/30m/24h, flip is config-only). Full-lifecycle e2e test. CLAUDE.md note + docs/design/phase-c2-claim-lease-engine.md. Full suite 10/10 turbo (server 1287, shared 433, integrator 293/1skip), typecheck 6/6, lint 6/6, build 5/5.

campaign_status: SHIPPED 2026-06-06 — all phases P1-P5 green; ships in shadow/long-grace; auto-reclaim 'on' is C1-gated.
open_issues: db:generate is broken repo-wide (meta/0005 & 0006 snapshot id collision); migrations 0007+ are hand-authored. Any future migration phase must hand-author in drizzle format (mirror 0017_merge_resolutions.sql). C2 has no further schema phases.
notes: Single-campaign drive of C2 from the vision arc (user named C2). Ships in shadow/long-grace; turning auto-reclaim 'on' is C1-gated, out of scope.
